Welcome to the channel of Ashutosh Pratihast.
In this video, I'm exposing the dark reality of artificial intelligence. I'll talk about the dangers of chatGPT, artificial general intelligence, and how they're being used to manipulate and control people.

Artificial intelligence is a growing field and it's important to be knowledgeable about the risks associated with it. In this video, I'm sharing with you some of the dangers of AI and how you can protect yourself from its negative effects. Watch the video to learn more about chatGPT and the dark reality of AI!
 In this gripping video, "Dark Reality of AI: Exposing Artificial Intelligence & ChatGPT," we uncover the unsettling truths behind the rise of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and its impact on our lives. Prepare to have your perspective challenged as we expose the hidden aspects of this rapidly evolving technology.

In this captivating exploration, we shed light on the origin of AI and how our generation has been subtly prepared for its integration through popular movies and TV shows. From the iconic Iron Man series to the futuristic Karishma Ka Karishma TV show, we uncover the subtle manipulation that has created an insatiable demand for AI. Join us as we unveil the alarming truth: what was once fiction has now become a chilling reality.

Moreover, we confront the darker side of AI's capabilities. Explore how AI can manipulate facts, presenting persuasive yet fabricated narratives that blur the line between truth and fiction. Uncover the potential dangers of AI's ability to sow discord, inciting communal riots and fueling the flames of civil unrest. Brace yourself for eye-opening insights and compelling evidence as we navigate the intricate web of AI's influence on society.


Subscribe to the channel for more thought-provoking content and stay up-to-date with our latest releases. Together, let's shed light on the dark reality of AI and uncover the truth hidden beneath the surface.

In this video, we're exposing the dangers of artificial intelligence and chatgpt. We're discussing the risks of AI and how it will impact our future.

This video is important for anyone who wants to know more about the dangers of artificial intelligence and chatgpt. We're discussing the risks of chatgpt and how it will impact our future. This is a must-watch for anyone who wants to know more about the dangers of AI!
we'll be discussing the dangers of artificial intelligence (AI) and how to protect yourself from the growing threat of chatGPT. AI is a growing threat that needs to be taken seriously, and we need to start exposing it to the public in a way that is Infotainment-worthy.

ChatGPT is a chatbot that has been able to generate realistic conversation based on a set of training data. This means that it is able to understand natural language and generate realistic conversations based on that knowledge. This is a huge concern, as chatbots are able to learn and evolve on their own, without being corrected or moderated. This opens up a world of possibilities for nefarious purposes, such as spying on people
